cases.prompt: 앱에 AdMob 광고 붙여줘. 보상형 광고도 넣고 싶어.

assertions.text: Integrates an ad SDK (AdMob/AdSense/Carbon) with placement strategy.
Covers ad formats including rewarded/보상형 ads.
Includes ad policy compliance checks (Google Ad Policy).

cases.prompt: Help me monetize my site with ads — AdSense setup and non-intrusive banner placement.

assertions.text: Proposes a non-intrusive ad placement strategy.
Mentions A/B testing of ad formats and/or an AdBlock fallback.
